title: An Ordinance Authorizing the Annual Budget of the Municipal Government of Los Baños for Fiscal Year 2024 Composed of the Expenditure Program and Sources of Financing for General Fund Proper Amounting to Four Hundred Twenty-five Million Eight Hundred Ninety-two Thousand Seven Hundred Twenty-six Pesos and 00/100 (P 425,892,726.00) and Two (2) Special Accounts, Specifically for Market Operation Amounting to Nine Million Three Hundred Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (P 9,300,000.00) and Slaughterhouse Op
